title: Skeletal
description: Skeletal Modpack for the Bones Network
body:
# Skeletal Modpack

## Overview

Welcome to the Skeletal Modpack, an exciting tech and exploration-focused Minecraft experience! This modpack is specifically designed for The Bones Network, offering a unique blend of mods to enhance your Minecraft adventures.

**Forked from Versatile Modpack**

Skeletal is forked from the popular Versatile Modpack, bringing in new features, optimizations, and a curated set of mods tailored for The Bones Network. Explore the vast possibilities of technology and embark on thrilling journeys with our carefully selected additions.

## Features

- **Tech Exploration**: Delve into the world of technology with a diverse range of mods that introduce automation, machinery, and advanced tools.

- **Exploration Enhancements**: Uncover new dimensions, discover hidden treasures, and face challenging mobs with exploration-focused mods that enrich your Minecraft experience.

- **Customization Options**: Enjoy a variety of customization options, allowing you to tailor your gameplay experience to suit your preferences.

- **Server Integration**: Skeletal is optimized for The Bones Network, ensuring seamless compatibility and a smooth multiplayer experience.

## Support and Feedback

For any issues, feedback, or community discussions, join our Discord server. We value your input and are dedicated to making Skeletal an incredible experience for everyone.

[Join the Discord Community](https://discord.gg/Q7mcG7X7M6)
